body.title: Day 2026-07-03
body.text:
## Done

- T-dicksimnel-cc-queue-path-fix — f0640371: DS.0 resolves cc_queue via uu_root() (parents[2]
- T-granny-rules-engine-tests-red — 085f4280 (shipped-unproven): REAL BUG — package-collapse
- T-inference-mark-anthropic-defunct — 1c35ff0c (shipped-unproven): first-class Source.defunct
- T-cc-tmux-session-dot-naming-broken — 2014e68f + proof 0880d438 [PROVEN]: dot-free tmux
- T-launcher-1m-default-fresh-session — 569bf200 (shipped-unproven): 1M context now DEFAULT in
- T-launcher-help-and-1m-flags — shipped-unproven (no launcher-proof harness; --1m validated
- D-granny-pull-dispatch-model-2026-07-03 — faae8f34: Granny PULL-dispatch + shim-owns-startup
- D-env-creds-device-cleanup-2026-07-03 — 5e7eab38 / retargeted accecdb5: clean env/creds/
- D-ds-builder-leveling-2026-07-03 — 9035e8a8: level DS.0 builder to CC.0 (listener close bug,
